channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Arsenal to exercise £45m Hincapie option as eight players face exit after title win
item.dc:creator: Sports Desk
item.description: The Unseen Cost of Arsenal's Premier League Crown Arsenal celebrates their first Premier League title in 22 years, but the champagne barely had time to settle before the harsh realities of modern football finance came knocking. A reported £45 million "option"...
item.content:encoded: The Unseen Cost of Arsenal's Premier League Crown Arsenal celebrates their first Premier League title in 22 years, but the champagne barely had time to settle before the harsh realities of modern football finance came knocking. A reported £45 million "option"...

item.title: Huduma Kenya Partners with KSG to Decentralize Public Training
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Huduma Kenya and the Kenya School of Government have launched public-sector training across 16 centers to improve access to professional development courses.
item.content:encoded: Huduma Kenya and the Kenya School of Government have launched public-sector training across 16 centers to improve access to professional development courses.

item.title: YoungBoySido criticizes Kenyan fans for favoring Drake over local acts
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: Content creator YoungBoySido has challenged Kenyans to support local music after noting more engagement for Drake than for artists like KRG The Don.
item.content:encoded: Content creator YoungBoySido has challenged Kenyans to support local music after noting more engagement for Drake than for artists like KRG The Don.

item.title: Transport Strike Exposes Security Gaps and Youth Unemployment Risks
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Recent nationwide transport strikes caused major economic disruption, highlighting police failure to maintain order and the volatile risks of youth joblessness.
item.content:encoded: Recent nationwide transport strikes caused major economic disruption, highlighting police failure to maintain order and the volatile risks of youth joblessness.

item.title: Kenya Signs Ten Bilateral Trade Deals With Kazakhstan

item.description: President William Ruto has signed ten bilateral agreements with Kazakhstan to expand trade in agriculture, technology, and infrastructure sectors.
